summary: Completed testing of GERdoctor iteration 20 - Estimated Completion Header Badge & Admin Impersonation features. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly. Backend: POST /api/admin/impersonate/{user_id} returns access_token and user object, requires admin auth (403 for non-admin), creates audit log entry. Frontend: User dashboard shows teal pill badge 'Abschluss DD.MM.YYYY' in sticky header, mobile shows badge below nav, Admin user list shows UserSwitch impersonate button for non-admin users, Admin row does NOT have impersonate button, Red 'Beenden' button appears during impersonation, Logout button hidden during impersonation, Clicking Beenden returns to admin dashboard.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/admin/impersonate/{user_id} returns 200 with access_token and user object
BACKEND: Impersonated token works - /auth/me returns target user's email
BACKEND: Non-admin cannot impersonate (returns 403)
BACKEND: Impersonate non-existent user returns 404
BACKEND: Impersonation creates audit log entry with action='impersonate'
BACKEND: GET /api/steps/estimated-completion returns valid ISO date
FRONTEND: User dashboard shows teal pill badge with data-testid='estimated-completion-banner'
FRONTEND: Badge shows 'Abschluss DD.MM.YYYY' format (26.08.2026)
FRONTEND: Badge has teal background (rgb(17, 79, 85)) and white text
FRONTEND: Badge stays visible when scrolling (sticky header)
FRONTEND: Mobile view shows estimated completion below nav with data-testid='estimated-completion-banner-mobile'
FRONTEND: Admin user list shows 6 impersonate buttons (UserSwitch icon)
FRONTEND: Admin row does NOT have impersonate button
FRONTEND: Clicking impersonate navigates to /dashboard for user role
FRONTEND: Clicking impersonate navigates to /partner-dashboard for partner role
FRONTEND: Red 'Beenden' button appears in header during impersonation
FRONTEND: Beenden button has red background (rgb(220, 38, 38))
FRONTEND: Logout button is hidden during impersonation
FRONTEND: Clicking Beenden returns to /admin dashboard
FRONTEND: Partner dashboard shows Beenden button during impersonation
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing users from iteration 19.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified: 1) Estimated completion moved to sticky header as teal pill badge with 'Abschluss DD.MM.YYYY' format, data-testid='estimated-completion-banner' (desktop) and 'estimated-completion-banner-mobile' (mobile), 2) Admin impersonation: POST /api/admin/impersonate/{user_id} returns JWT for target user, AuthContext.impersonate() saves admin token in sessionStorage, navigates to /dashboard or /partner-dashboard based on role, 3) Red 'Beenden' button with data-testid='stop-impersonation-btn' replaces logout during impersonation, 4) Impersonate button uses UserSwitch icon with data-testid='impersonate-user-{id}', only shown for non-admin users, 5) Impersonation creates audit log entry.
